prerequisites.value: Shapeshifter Style, Shapeshifter Twist, base attack bonus +8, change shape ability, shapechanger subtype.

description.value:
**Benefit:** While you are using Shapeshifter Style, if you use your change shape or wild shape ability as a standard action, you can also make a single melee attack with one of your natural weapons at your highest base attack bonus against one foe within your reach.

**Special:** A character with the wild shape class feature counts as having the change shape ability and shapechanger subtype for the purpose of meeting this featâs prerequisites.
